title: cheilanthes nealleyi var. mexicana
intro: Cheilanthes nealleyi var. mexicana, also known as Mexican lipfern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Cheilanthes nealleyi var. mexicana include relief from coughs, colds, and asthma, as well as soothing and calming effects on the skin. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which are used to treat skin conditions and respiratory problems.
